source: https://github.com/trending?since=daily (fetched via WebFetch; direct curl to github.com in this sandbox is intercepted by the session proxy and only api.github.com calls scoped to the mounted repo are allowed, so scripts/fetch_trending.py's HTML-curl approach could not run here)

items.description: Self-hosted AI companion with voice chat and gaming capabilities
100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run
Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex
PowerShell utility for removing pre-installed applications and disabling telemetry on Windows
AI coding assistant skill mapping code/docs into a queryable knowledge graph
Fitness dataset with 1,324 exercises, animations and multilingual instructions
Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents

notes: WebFetch's summarizer model reliably returned only ranks 1-10 across three separate requests (with consistent stars/descriptions each time); attempts to request ranks 11-25 returned hallucinated repeats of items already in 1-10, so the list was capped at 10 verified items rather than trusting fabricated continuations.
